title: phacelia ivesiana var. glandulifera
intro: Phacelia ivesiana var. glandulifera, also known as glandular phacelia, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family native to California. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Phacelia ivesiana var. glandulifera can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
